seo.title: Bread with stone-ground flour - Marinda Kook

html:
Baking bread is pure joy. It starts with the mixing, the delight of the first rise, putting it into the greased pans, the second rise, the baking and the smell of freshly baked bread and then the eating!!! Great joy.

Ingredients

  • 500g white bread flour
  • 500g brown bread flour
  • 1 litre lukewarm water
  • 10 ml salt
  • 10 ml instant yeast
  • 10 ml brown sugar
  • 30 ml olive oil
  • 60 ml plain yoghurt

Method

  1. Put all the ingredients except the flour into your mixing bowl and stir.
  2. Add the flour and, using your dough hook, mix in your electric mixer until everything comes together nicely. About 10 min.
  3. Turn out onto a floured surface and shape into a ball.
  4. Grease your bowl with oil and place the dough back in it.
  5. Let it rise until it has doubled.
  6. Knock back and divide between 2 bread pans.
  7. Let it rise.
  8. Bake for 40 min at 180 °
